message.content:
#set heading(numbering: "1.")
#set math.equation(numbering: "(1)")

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Inline and Display Mathematics]
  #v(0.5em)
  Source-backed grouped formula sample
])

= Expressions

#par(hanging-indent: 1em)[*Expression 1.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$ = integral dt d theta d phi dt' d theta' d phi' (sin theta sin theta' Phi_(-)(t, theta, phi) Phi_(-)(t', theta', phi')) / [cosh((t-t')/a) - (sin theta sin theta' cos(phi-phi') + cos theta cos theta')]^h $

#par(hanging-indent: 1em)[*Expression 2.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$ #text("$( V(\psi \otimes \bar{w}, z) ( |chi>_l \otimes |bar{u}>_l ) )_m := lim_{bar(z) -> 0} bar(z)^(bar(Delta)_j + bar(Delta)_l - bar(Delta)_m) ( phi(\psi \otimes \bar{w}; z, bar(z)) ( |chi>_l \otimes |bar{u}>_l ) )_m$") $

#par(hanging-indent: 1em)[*Expression 3.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$ gamma^(-1/2) e^phi [ (delta S)/(delta gamma_(i j)) (delta S)/(delta gamma_(k l)) gamma_(i k) gamma_(j l) + 1/2 ((delta S)/(delta phi))^2 + gamma_(i j) (delta S)/(delta gamma_(i j)) (delta S)/(delta phi) ] = 0 $

#par(hanging-indent: 1em)[*Expression 4.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$ #text("$+ 1/2 G_(i j) G^(alpha beta) partial_alpha Phi^i partial_beta Phi^j ( 1 + (tilde(b)) / (2 pi^2 alpha') ) + 1 / (8 pi g_s) integral d^4 x 1/4 F_(alpha beta) tilde(F)^(alpha beta) ( (c + C_0 b) / (2 pi^2 alpha') )$") $

#par(hanging-indent: 1em)[*Expression 5.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$ Delta_(epsilon, overline(epsilon))^(1) = (sigma^2)/2 dot (m - i epsilon hat(p)) / (2m) dot (m - i overline(epsilon) overline(p)) / (2m) dot (1 - sigma_p^2) = Psi_(epsilon, overline(epsilon)) dot overline(Psi)_(epsilon, overline(epsilon)) $
